title: Quieter Dispensers and Droppers
description: Reduces the noise produced by Dispensers and Droppers.
body:
Reduces the noise produced by Dispensers and Droppers, without affecting other sounds. Version 1.9 and above supports changing sounds using json files, decreasing file sizes and increasing performance. Versions below 1.9 use the only way to do this, a quieter sound replacement and might require a game restart.


Click here or on the image above for the Mute version **You might also want to use:** |[![Mute Pistons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3aeec93b0bdb43d8d4633fd32d1367a906006c67.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mute-pistons)|[![Quieter Pistons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1164bd3922a7fca0f83fc50bae850740e7b226c9.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/quieter-pistons)|[![Old Water](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b1994e448bfaa2fdd6151914c7399c544542656.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/old-water)|[![Old Bedrock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a55b4e5f09807330765f97171d2f6221e8a356b5_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/old-bedrock)|[![New Bedrock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03cbeab1a95d2a9d4710b68d522031bba5fb3d69_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/new-bedrock)|[![Vanilla Hearts HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10bb8f272918f8777c6af0bfe70ad575be6f0fa6.gif)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-hearts)|[![Vanilla Hunger HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1336a6f717600e59b291fbbe5d48c67715e6a61f.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-hunger) |:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:| |[Mute Pistons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mute-pistons)|[Quieter Pistons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/quieter-pistons)|[Old Water](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/old-water)|[Old Bedrock](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/old-bedrock)|[New Bedrock](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/new-bedrock)|[Vanilla Hearts HUD](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-hearts)|[Vanilla Hunger HUD](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-hunger)
